title: Specify resolved rules export
description: Wire shape emitted by `specify rules export --format json` for the `ResolvedRules` export contract. The export is the read-only resolved view of shared, source-adapter, and target-adapter rules for a project, target adapter, slice, or artifact path. Frontmatter `snake_case` keys (`lint_mode`, `rule_hints`, `deprecated.replaced_by`) are emitted as kebab-case at every nesting level (`lint-mode`, `rule-hints`, `deprecated.replaced-by`). The schema is the authoritative source for exported field names; producers MUST validate output against it.

version.description: Envelope version. v1 pins this to 1; widening the export contract requires a v2 envelope.

target-adapter.description: Resolved target-adapter name, optionally versioned as `<name>@v<major>`.

source-adapters.description: Source-adapter names bound to the export context. May be empty when the resolver is invoked without source bindings.

rules.description: Ordered rule list. Producer ordering is `(non-deprecated, severity, origin, rule-id)` for the `ResolvedRules` export contract.

ruleId.description: Closed v1 rule-id namespace (`UNI`, `SRC`, `FRAME`, `RUST`, `IFACE`, `SEC`, `OMNIA`, `VECTIS`, `ORG`) with three-digit numeric suffixes. Mirrors `rule.schema.json#/$defs/ruleId`.

adapterRef.description: Kebab-case adapter token, optionally suffixed with `@v<major>`. Mirrors `rule.schema.json#/$defs/adapterRef`.

relativePathPattern.description: Project-relative path or glob. A leading `!` marks an exclusion path-pattern hint. Mirrors `rule.schema.json#/$defs/relativePathPattern`.

severity.description: Closed severity enum, ordered for sort stability (`critical < important < suggestion < optional`). Producer-side severity-aware comparators use this sequence; JSON Schema does not enforce ordering.

origin.description: Resolver origin tier. Producer-side ordering is `target < source < shared < core < unknown`. `target` comes from a target-adapter overlay; `source` from a source-adapter overlay; `shared` from `adapters/shared/rules/`; `core` from the core rules pack; `unknown` is the consumer indexer's fallback for rule files whose path does not match a recognized adapter shape. JSON Schema does not enforce ordering.

pathRoot.description: Anchor for the rule `path`. Shared rules and rules-root fallback overlays anchor at `rules-root`; project-local overlays anchor at `project-dir`; cached adapter-rule overlays anchor at `cache` (the out-of-tree per-project cache root, with a cache-relative `manifests/...` path).

lintMode.description: How the rule is expected to be linted. The lint runner decides execution; this field only classifies the rule.

hintKind.description: Closed v1 deterministic-hint kind enum. Every kind is executable; `specify lint` owns execution semantics.

negative-match.description: When true, emit one finding per line where the pattern does not match.

capture-group.description: 1-based capture group index to parse as an integer for threshold comparison.

capture-op.description: Comparison operator applied to the captured integer.

suffix-must-not-start-with.description: Per-match filter: skip matches whose remainder starts with this literal prefix.

slash-skill-positional.description: When true, apply CORE-023 slash-skill positional semantics instead of matching `value` as a regex.

join-backslash-continuations.description: When true with `slash-skill-positional`, join backslash- and indent-continued rows before scanning.

value.description: Hint payload, interpreted by a future validator or review tool.

description.description: Optional human explanation for the hint.

config.description: Per-kind configuration: `regex` uses regexHintConfig when kind is regex.

label.description: Short display label for the reference.

path.description: Repository-relative reference path. Resolves against the rule's `path-root`.

applicability.description: Inclusive narrowing filter. All populated dimensions must match (AND semantics).

deprecatedInfo.description: Deprecation metadata. Frontmatter `replaced_by` exports as wire-key `replaced-by`.

path.description: Path to the rule markdown file, relative to `path-root`.

body.description: Verbatim markdown body (everything after the closing `---` frontmatter delimiter), including section headings such as `## Rule`.

deprecated.description: Deprecation metadata, or `null` when the rule is active. Absence and explicit `null` are equivalent.
